testcase.name: CodeBlock > Inline vs Block Rendering > renders inline code with proper styling
CodeBlock > Inline vs Block Rendering > renders block code with syntax highlighter

failure.message:

testcase.name: CodeBlock > Copy Button > shows copy button for block code
CodeBlock > Copy Button > does not show copy button for inline code
CodeBlock > Copy Button > copies code to clipboard when clicked
CodeBlock > Copy Button > shows "Copied!" feedback after copy
CodeBlock > Line Numbers > shows line numbers for code >10 lines
CodeBlock > Line Numbers > does not show line numbers for code <=10 lines

testcase.name: CodeBlock > Line Numbers > respects explicit showLineNumbers prop
CodeBlock > Children Conversion > handles string children
CodeBlock > Children Conversion > handles number children
CodeBlock > Children Conversion > handles React element children
CodeBlock > Children Conversion > handles array children
CodeBlock > Edge Cases > handles empty code

testcase.name: CodeBlock > Accessibility > has proper ARIA label for code region
CodeBlock > Accessibility > copy button has accessible label
